name: plan002-skills-folder-retirement
description: stock-investment ADR-006 분리 패턴 마이그. skills/<name>/scripts/* → scripts/<name>/, skills/<name>/{SKILL.md, references/} → .claude/skills/<name>/. 3 skill (stock-investing-morning-brief / current-issue-analysis / daily-stock-analysis-note) + 4 runner (run_report + run_smoke_test + run_issue_report + run_daily_note) SKILL_ROOT/path 갱신. cron payload absolute path는 plan002 완료 후 사용자 수동 갱신 (openclaw_safety 정책).
related_docs: stock-investment/AGENTS.md (분리 패턴 진입점 + cron 갱신 안내)
